turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Hi, I'd like to schedule a check-up appointment, please.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: That's fine, thank you for letting me know. I’d like to book a routine check-up appointment, preferably in the next two weeks. Do you have any openings for a weekday afternoon?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of pretty good, AI.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Um, I think there might be a mix-up. I'm looking to schedule a routine check-up, not for orthopedic issues. Could you help me with that?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Pivot Point Orthopedics focuses on joint muscle and bone care. We don't offer General routine check-ups or Primary Care visits.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Oh, I see! I must have called the wrong place then. Can you recommend where I might be able to schedule a general check-up? I really appreciate it!

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Concern. I can assist if you have any Orthopedic needs or questions about our Clinic, just let me know how I can help.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: I appreciate that, but I really need a general check-up. I'm on a bit of a time crunch here since I'm on my lunch break. Could you direct me to a clinic that does routine check-ups? Thank you!

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: I'm sorry, but I can't refer you to other clinics.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: That's okay, I understand. Thank you for your help anyway. I’ll try to find another clinic on my own. Have a great day!
